column1: Table 3. State Counts for Fentanyl and Fentanyl-Related Substances: 2021
Counts of fentanyl and fentanyl-related compounds submitted to laboratories from January 1, 2021, through December 31, 2021, and analyzed by March 31, 2022
Source: U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration, Diversion Control Division, National Forensic Laboratory Information System, 2021. Data generated: August 1, 2022.

Suggested Citation: U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration, Diversion Control Division. (2022). Table 3. State counts for fentanyl and fentanyl-related substances: 2021. Retrieved from the NFLIS Publication page at https://www.nflis.deadiversion.usdoj.gov/publicationsRedesign.xhtml
